data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193268: Heh?\pI don't know who you are, but if you get\nin the way of TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, don't\lexpect any mercy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1932C5: Hold it right there, TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}!\pWe, TEAM {GOOD_TEAM}, won't allow you to\nget away with your misdeeds!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193320:
Hehehe!
Even TEAM {GOOD_TEAM} joins us!\pBut it's too much trouble to deal with
you all...\pHeh, it doesn't matter!\pWe've got the METEORITE, so off to
MT. CHIMNEY we go!\pHehehe! Be seeing you, you TEAM
{GOOD_TEAM} dingbats!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1933EC:
And you are?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pFine, so you are {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI am MAXIE. As the head of TEAM MAGMA,
I have dedicated myself to thwarting\lthe dangerous plans of TEAM AQUA.\pWhy? Because TEAM AQUA is a grave
threat to us all.\pThey have committed many destructive
acts in their bid to enlarge the sea.\pWe, TEAM MAGMA, love dry land above
all! TEAM AQUA is our sworn enemy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193584:
Who might you be?\p... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...\pAh, so you are {PLAYER}{KUN}.\pI am ARCHIE. As the head of TEAM AQUA,
I have dedicated myself to thwarting\lthe dangerous plans of TEAM MAGMA.\pWhy? Because TEAM MAGMA is a grave
threat to us all.\pThey have committed many destructive
acts in their bid to expand the land.\pWe, TEAM AQUA, love the sea above
all! TEAM MAGMA is our sworn enemy!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_193747: {GOOD_LEADER}: Yes, yes, we must!\nWe've got to hurry.\pThere's no telling what TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}\nwill do at MT. CHIMNEY!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1937AA: {GOOD_LEADER}: {PLAYER}{KUN}, you should keep\nan eye out for TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}, too.\pFarewell!
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_1937EB:
I... I'm COZMO...
I'm a PROFESSOR...\pI usually study METEORITES in
FALLARBOR TOWN...\pThen some people from TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}
made me guide them to METEOR FALLS...\pThey promised me that they would
excavate METEORITES for me...\pBut, I...
TEAM {EVIL_TEAM} tricked me...\pOh... That METEORITE...
It will never be mine now...\pBut that TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}...\pWhat are they going to do with that
METEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?
data/maps/MeteorFalls_1F_1R/text.inc.MeteorFalls_1F_1R_Text_19396A: PROF. COZMO: That TEAM {EVIL_TEAM}...\pWhat are they going to do with that\nMETEORITE at MT. CHIMNEY?
